title: Crypto Security Pioneer: 'I Now Consider All of DeFi Unsafe'
summary: A well-known crypto security pioneer has publicly stated that they now consider all of decentralized finance (DeFi) unsafe. This comes amid rising concerns about vulnerabilities and exploits in the space. The expert cited recent high-profile hacks as a major reason for their stance.
body:
A prominent figure in crypto security has made a bold statement, declaring that they now consider all of decentralized finance (DeFi) to be unsafe. This warning comes from an individual who has long been respected in the industry for their expertise in identifying and mitigating security risks in blockchain projects.

The expert cited a series of recent high-profile hacks and exploits as the primary reason for their shift in perspective. They pointed to incidents where millions of dollars were lost due to vulnerabilities in smart contracts and other DeFi protocols. The expert also mentioned that the lack of regulatory oversight and the complexity of DeFi platforms contribute to the ongoing risks.

For everyday users, this statement is a significant red flag. DeFi has been touted as a way to access financial services without intermediaries, but the increasing frequency of exploits highlights the risks involved. Users should be extremely cautious when engaging with DeFi platforms and consider the potential for loss.

Moving forward, users should stay informed about the latest security practices and consider using platforms that have undergone rigorous audits. Additionally, keeping an eye on regulatory developments in the DeFi space could provide some level of protection as the industry evolves.
twitterThread: A top crypto security pioneer just called all of DeFi 'unsafe'—citing recent hacks where millions were lost. Should you be worried?
The expert pointed to vulnerabilities in smart contracts and lack of regulation as major concerns. DeFi's promise of decentralization comes with serious risks.

If you're using DeFi, double-check security audits and stay updated on regulatory changes. This isn't a drill. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-04-crypto-security-expert-declares-defi-unsafe
standaloneTweet: A leading crypto security pioneer just declared all of DeFi 'unsafe' due to recent hacks. If you're using DeFi, it's time to reassess your risks.
